pom.xml.general_idea: Update the project's target Java version from 11 to 21 to align with the migration goal.

.circleci/config.yml.general_idea: Switch the CI Docker image from OpenJDK 11 to Eclipse Temurin 21 to align with the target Java version.
Install Maven via apk because the new Alpine-based image does not include it by default.
Install make via apk to satisfy build requirements in the new Alpine environment.
